videos.title: How A Random System Can Actually Be Predictable
videos.author: Veritasium
videos.description:
The balls in a Galton board fall down randomly. Any time they come to a junction they can take any number of paths and it's almost impossible to accurately predict every ball's trajectory.

However, the system as a whole is predictable.

videos.title: How An Infinite Hotel Ran Out Of Room
videos.author: Veritasium
videos.description:
If there's a hotel with infinite rooms, could it ever be completely full? 

Could you run out of space to put everyone? 

The surprising answer is yes -- this is important to know if you're the manager of the Hilbert Hotel.
